title: Asplenium procerum
taxonomy: Asplenium procerum is classified within the family Aspleniaceae, which is a group of ferns commonly known as spleenworts. This family is further grouped into the order Polypodiales, which comprises a diverse range of ferns with various growth habits. Asplenium procerum specifically belongs to the genus Asplenium, a group of ferns characterized by their distinctive leaf morphology and often epiphytic or lithophytic growth habits. The exact classification of Asplenium procerum at the species level is not immediately available in my knowledge, but it is generally recognized as a species of fern within the Asplenium genus. Further research would be required to confirm its precise classification.
